notes: L3-only ablation completed successfully. Training on 275 L3 (conceptual/deep) samples yields loss (0.6922) virtually identical to G2 (0.6923). This is a STRONG result confirming that: (1) L3 errors are the PRIMARY driver of EDW-Step-DPO improvement, (2) 275 L3 samples alone achieves comparable training to 293 mixed-depth samples, (3) L3-only training on 93.9% of G2's sample count performs equivalently. Combined with G5 (L1-only: 18 samples, loss 0.6927), the evidence strongly supports that deep conceptual errors (L3) are essential while shallow errors (L1) provide minimal additional signal.
